title: indigofera elongata
intro: Indigofera elongata, also known as the elongated indigo plant, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family, Fabaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Indigofera elongata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat digestive issues, as well as its potential to protect against oxidative stress and cell damage. Indigofera elongata can be prepared as a tea or infusion, and its extracts can also be used in tinctures or capsules, making it a versatile herbal remedy.
